name: public_health_water_allocation_model_marrowbridge_lib_eq
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Public Health, the situation tagged internally around public health water allocation model marrowbridge lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The organization’s past incidents make liberty feel morally loud today, while equality is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Ravi Kim
agents.identity: I am Ravi Kim, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Public Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Marco Mensah
agents.identity: I am Marco Mensah, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Public Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so equality does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so liberty does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Ravi Kim must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Ravi Kim do?
